---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a bug for problems with existing functionality
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Repro Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

Ex)
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Acceptance Criteria
Testing scenarios that can be used to confirm the bug is resolved.
